overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a futuristic corporate atrium with a glass ceiling and central statue, then transitioning through an exit to an outdoor neon-lit urban plaza at dusk featuring skyscrapers, palm trees, and a large Ferris wheel.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate atrium with glass ceiling and central statue

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the geometric glass skylight ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious indoor atrium, observing the modern architecture and central golden statue

entered.detail: geometric glass and steel ceiling structure allowing natural light into the atrium
golden abstract sculpture on a pedestal in the middle of the atrium
tall vertical structural columns supporting the multi-level building
large spiky leaf plants in white rectangular planters
green illuminated corporate signage on the interior wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic corporate atrium with a high glass ceiling. The camera walks around the central golden statue, passing tropical plants in planters and concrete pillars. The Arasaka corporate sign becomes visible on the right wall as the camera moves deeper into the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit corridor transitioning to outdoor plaza

events.description: passing through glass exit doors from indoor atrium to outdoor urban plaza
emerging from artificial lighting into natural dusk light with purple sky

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit doors and stepping out into the open plaza

entered.detail: large automatic glass doors marking the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces
short black and yellow posts lining the plaza entrance
tall futuristic towers visible through the exit doors in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the final section of the indoor atrium toward the exit. Passing through the glass doors, the scene transitions dramatically from the enclosed artificial environment to an open urban plaza at dusk, with the city skyline becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with neon advertisements and palm trees

events.description: large Ferris wheel structure becomes visible on the right side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, observing the surrounding skyscrapers and neon signs, approaching the Ferris wheel

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements on the sides of buildings including a prominent Turbo sign
tall palm trees lining the plaza walkways
large amusement park Ferris wheel structure against the dusk sky
futuristic cars parked along the side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores the outdoor cyberpunk cityscape at dusk. The camera walks across the concrete plaza past palm trees and parked vehicles, with towering skyscrapers and bright neon billboards surrounding the area. The camera approaches a large Ferris wheel structure on the right as it continues through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a corporate atrium into a sprawling, neon-lit urban plaza at dusk. It begins by circling a central golden statue amidst tropical plants and concrete pillars, moving deeper into the space as an Arasaka corporate sign appears on the right wall. As the camera approaches the exit, the scene transitions dramatically through glass doors, shifting from the enclosed artificial environment to the open air of the city. The view then expands across a concrete plaza dotted with palm trees and parked vehicles, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards. Finally, the camera pushes further into the cyberpunk cityscape, drawing closer to a massive Ferris wheel structure under the darkening sky.
